---
title: "Chapter 6: Evidence over Attestation"
subtitle: "Executive Governance Series"
doc-type: executive-governance-chapter
audience: [Executive, Customer]
classification: Controlled
boundary: GCC-Moderate
family: executive-governance-series
series-order: 6
status: Stub
repo-path: docs/customer-documents/executive-governance-series/ch06-evidence-over-attestation
created-at: 2026-04-26
updated-at: 2026-04-26
---

# Evidence over Attestation

::: {.callout-note}
## Under Development
This chapter is under active development.
Content will be derived from canonical governance articles as they are finalized.
:::

## Overview

Argues for continuous, machine-generated evidence over periodic human attestation as the foundation for trustworthy compliance.

## Key Takeaways

_This section will be populated when the chapter content is finalized._

## Related Documents

- [Executive Governance Series Index](../index.qmd)
- [Document Index](../../document-index.qmd)
